scripts.dev: concurrently "PORT=3001 pnpm --filter media-server-status-backend dev" "pnpm --filter media-server-status-frontend dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter media-server-status-frontend build && pnpm --filter media-server-status-backend build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter media-server-status-backend test && pnpm --filter media-server-status-frontend test
